summary: Harbor remains an operational contract obligation under internal clarification; owner, stage, next action, and canonical Drive archive need confirmation before any external follow-up is proposed.

situations.label: Harbor contract record is stale
situations.rationale: The record has enough signal to warrant operational review, but not enough evidence to mark the obligation ready, done, or externally actionable.

goals: Identify the accountable owner for Harbor contract follow-up.
Confirm the current contract stage from the canonical source.
Link the retained Drive record or identify the missing archive gap.
Create only internal follow-up until approval authority is clear.
blockers: Current contract stage is not evidenced.
Canonical Drive archive reference is missing.
open_questions: What is the current Harbor contract stage?
Where is the canonical Drive document or retained archive reference?
What internal approval is needed before any external contract action?

next_actions.summary: Patrick should identify the owner, current stage, next action, and canonical Drive reference before any external follow-up is proposed.
